title: BLOT Finger Paint Set 10 Colors Non Toxic Kids Poster Paint Set Safe Finger Art Painting Kits for Toddlers Kids Drawing Gifts, 36ml/Tube, Age 3+
features: Non Toxic & User Friendly- Made of eco friendly premium finger paint, the washable paint will be safe and mess free for kids’ painting time. All the painting tools with smooth edges keep fingers from hurting and shall be perfect for kids using

Bright And Colorful Kids Paint Set- 10 different vibrant colours finger paints,White,Lemon Yellow,Orange,Red,Blue,Green,pink,purple,brown and black.Different colours mixed can create beautiful new colours.With strong coloring force,non toxic childrens paint can be used for hands,skin,clothes,writing paper,water powder paper,sketch paper,handicraft and wood art products

Keep Your Kids Mess Free- These washable paints for kids are super easily washes from skin and most washable clothing.You can fully enjoy the world of finger painting by your fingertips, fingers, palms, the back of the hand, hand side, and just to take some appropriate pigments, then through fingerprints, palm prints, doodles and other forms work on the paper

Develop Creativity- Finger painting for toddlers awaken them to a world of creative self-expression and put imaginative and creative art at kids' fingertips, it will encourage children to express, create, and connect through colorful play
Multifunctional Kids Painting Set- The washable kids painting kit will be perfect for kids early painting learning, having fun, creativity development, educational gift for birthday and Christmas
